title: Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti
tagline: Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Pallikonda Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Vishnu, located at Malayadippatti in Kulathur taluk of Pudukkottai district in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Pallikonda Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Vishnu, located at Malayadippatti in Kulathur taluk of Pudukkottai district in Tamil Nadu, India. This is a small village and one of the important rock cut temples of Pudukkottai district such as Thirumayam Rock cut temple. The Dvarapala's have only 2 hands unlike the other Dvarapala's who have 4 hands in other Vishnu temples.

topPlaces.name: Palaiyapatti Therkusethi

topPlaces.name: Kunnandarkoil Cave Temple
topPlaces.description: Kunnandarkoil Cave Temple in Kunnandarkoil, a village in Pudukottai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in Rock-cut architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the 8th century by Muttaraiyar kings, the cardinals of Pallavas, with later expansion from the Vijayanagar Empire.

topPlaces.name: Manaiyeripatti
topPlaces.description: Manaiyeripatti is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sengipatti
topPlaces.description: Sengipatti is a village in Budalur taluk on the Tanjore–Trichy National Highway of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. It is located 23 kilometers from Thanjavur, 33 kilometers from Tiruchirapalli, 46 kilometers from Pudukkottai, 65 kilometers from Ariyalur, and 66 kilometers from Kumbakonam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti?
faq.a: Stays in Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pallikonda Perumal Temple, Malayadippatti?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palaiyapatti Vadakkusethi, Palaiyapatti Therkusethi, Kunnandarkoil Cave Temple, Manaiyeripatti, Sengipatti.
